title: Annotated walkthrough of ONE licence-verified OA RCT paper
context: The M0 slice requires a concrete demonstration of appraisal in action. This walkthrough pairs exactly one licence-verified, fully open-access oncology RCT paper with inline appraisal commentary keyed to the RCT worksheet (task 007). The paper must be verified per-article for a reuse-permitting licence (CC0, CC-BY, or CC-BY-SA) and recorded in sources.yaml with PMCID/DOI and licence before any content is authored.
objective: Author an annotated walkthrough applying the RCT worksheet (task 007) to exactly one licence-verified, fully open-access oncology RCT paper — demonstrating the appraisal process end-to-end and obtaining dual high-tier sign-off.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses exactly one oncology RCT paper from the PMC Open Access Subset with a verified reuse-permitting licence (CC0, CC-BY, or CC-BY-SA) recorded in data/sources.yaml with PMCID, DOI, licence, licenceVerifiedDate, and verifiedBy before authoring begins.
Figures are reproduced only if the paper's licence explicitly permits reproduction; otherwise they are linked by PMCID/figure number. No figures from NC/ND-licensed papers are reproduced.
Applies the RCT worksheet (task 007) inline: each worksheet question is addressed in turn with commentary explaining what the paper shows and what an advocate should notice.
Renders no verdicts on the paper's findings or on the drug/treatment studied; framing is purely methodological ('this is what this section of the paper shows and why it matters for appraisal').
Carries a persistent 'education only — not medical advice' notice.
Passes the advice-language checklist (task 002) and the licence + provenance build gate (task 004).
Signed off by a credentialed oncologist (recorded in the review ledger): clinical framing is correct and no section reads as treatment guidance.
Signed off by an experienced patient advocate (recorded in the review ledger): walkthrough is clear, accessible, and does not stray into advice.
Signed off by a methodology reviewer: appraisal commentary is methodologically accurate.
resources: PLAN.md (§ Scope — annotated walkthroughs; § Data, licensing & compliance — Source classes)
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/tools/openftlist/ (PMC OA Subset — source for licence-verified papers)
output: An annotated walkthrough document (content/walkthroughs/rct-walkthrough-001.md) committed to the repo, applying the RCT worksheet to a single CC-licensed OA paper, with the paper's provenance in sources.yaml, CI-green, and carrying dual high-tier sign-off plus methodology review.
